profile.title: Spirit Detective
profile.description: A fearless close-range brawler who controls space with concentrated spirit energy.

moves.name: Rapid Strike
moves.description: A quick close-range strike that builds spirit energy.

moves.name: Power Hook
moves.description: A slower heavy blow with more damage and knockback.

moves.name: Spirit Gun
moves.description: Spends spirit meter to fire a fast long-range projectile.
